examples: What made matters worse was that its proliferation coincided with sweeping changes in agriculture and a massive shift from sheep farming to dairying.
Small changes in production or consumption of dairy products in the major dairying countries can lead to volatility in world dairy product prices.
A growing number of studies have found that some lactic acid bacteria do seem to offer health benefits, supporting the lore of traditional dairying cultures.
Ms. BURKE: It would have been a huge decision to have to leave dairying and sell off our land in order to have an income, and it's allowed us to retire with some ease.
